'''Xyquine II''', also known simply as '''Xyquine''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Xyquine system/Legends|Xyquine system]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]. The world boasted a diverse array of life.

{{Planet-stub}}
